items.title: S01E01 - Special Offer
items.summary: A misfit teenage checkout operator has an unrequited crush on her supermarket manager. At the same shop's cuddly cartoon mascot seems to have come alive and is causing havoc.

infolabels.title: Special Offer
infolabels.plot: A misfit teenage checkout operator has an unrequited crush on her supermarket manager. At the same shop's cuddly cartoon mascot seems to have come alive and is causing havoc.

items.title: S01E02 - During Barty's Party
items.summary: A suburban couple are held under siege by a pack of frighteningly intelligent rats.

infolabels.title: During Barty's Party
infolabels.plot: A suburban couple are held under siege by a pack of frighteningly intelligent rats.

items.title: S01E03 - Buddy Boy
items.summary: When a nightclub owner buys a derelict dolphinarium, he and a young woman seem to be haunted by the ghost of Buddy Boy, the star attraction.

infolabels.title: Buddy Boy
infolabels.plot: When a nightclub owner buys a derelict dolphinarium, he and a young woman seem to be haunted by the ghost of Buddy Boy, the star attraction.

items.title: S01E04 - Baby
items.summary: A young couple move to the countryside and discover a strange mummified animal in the wall of their cottage. The wife increasingly feels that she and her unborn child are in danger.

infolabels.title: Baby
infolabels.plot: A young couple move to the countryside and discover a strange mummified animal in the wall of their cottage. The wife increasingly feels that she and her unborn child are in danger.

items.title: S01E05 - What Big Eyes
items.summary: An RSPCA officer is horrified when he discovers a pet shop owner has been conducting experiments on a wolf, searching for proof of lycanthropy.

infolabels.title: What Big Eyes
infolabels.plot: An RSPCA officer is horrified when he discovers a pet shop owner has been conducting experiments on a wolf, searching for proof of lycanthropy.

items.title: S01E06 - The Dummy
items.summary: A washed-up actor has a nervous breakdown and believes that he really is the movie monster that he has been hired to play.

infolabels.title: The Dummy
infolabels.plot: A washed-up actor has a nervous breakdown and believes that he really is the movie monster that he has been hired to play.
